TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Utkarsh_Ambudkar, title = Utkarsh_Ambudkar, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Utkarsh_Ambudkar} }

S.FORM: Utkarsh Ambudkar kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 12, Utkarsh Ambudkar, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Utkarsh Ambudkar kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 12, Utkarsh Ambudkar, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: utkars~ɕħ amβu*kar kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, utkars~ɕħ amβu*kar, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
